EmailTemplate.name: Annual Meeting Event Notice Four
EmailTemplate.subject: 温馨提示：21日年度营销会议及班车时间 Reminder: 2025 Annual Marketing Meeting and bus schedule on the 21st
EmailTemplate.textOnly:
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c}，
2025年度营销会议将于明早8:30继续进行，地点仍为国际中心L2会议室。提醒您佩戴嘉宾证前往。 大巴车将从海天酒店接您前往国际中心，发车时间：21日8:00，发车地点：海天金融中心酒店正门。
Dear {!Internal_Registration__c.Name_CN__c},
The 2025 Annual Marketing Meeting will continue tomorrow morning at 8:30 in the Meeting Hall of Hisense International Center. Kindly remind you to wear your Guest Card.
A bus will take you from the Haitian Financial Center Hotel to the International Center, departing at 8:00 on the 21st from the hotel main entrance.
